item.title: T-Mobile adds free new service as it loses phone customers
item.description: T-Mobile is testing a new tool for phone customers amid recent losses, giving users early access to a service top rivals still haven’t launched.

item.title: Palantir finally gets a Pentagon green light Wall Street can’t ignore
item.description: Palantir Technologies (PLTR) notched another key win, picking up a Pentagon approval that doesn’t look flashy. However, when you look at the details o...

item.title: Grocery store closures spark emergency action
item.description: In recent years, grocery chains across the country have reevaluated operations as inflation, shifting consumer behavior, rising labor costs, and ongoi...

item.title: New Tesla vision sounds almost too good to be true
item.description: I never understood the consternation surrounding Tesla CEO Elon Musk's pay package. If Tesla investors voted to pay him a gazillion dollars, who are w...

item.title: Walmart's new home collection has vibrant rugs, pillows, and more, starting at $13
item.description: It's filled with colorful, eye-catching pieces.
